use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms, landing pages, and modal dialogs
Destructive action triggers with red styling for delete or warning operations
Navigation links with underline styling for secondary navigation patterns
Icon-only buttons for toolbar actions and compact UI contexts
Loading state buttons for async operations like form submissions
ai_summary: A highly reusable button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible variant and size customization. Supports multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (sm, default, lg, xl, icon). Includes accessibility features like focus-visible rings, loading states, and icon slot support for left/right positioning. Designed as an atomic component suitable for any UI system requiring consistent button styling across SaaS, e-commerce, or dev-tool applications.
